info.title: Antique Shop API
info.description: API documentation for the Antique Shop application

put.summary: Assign a new role to a user
put.description: Assigns a new role (ROLE_MANAGER, ROLE_CUSTOMER) to the user.
Updates the profile information of the authenticated user.
Allows the authenticated user to update their password.
Allows the authenticated user to reset their password securely.

get.description: Fetches a product by its unique ID.

put.description: Updates the details of an existing product.

delete.description: Deletes a product by its ID.

get.description: Fetches the details of a category by its ID.

put.description: Updates the details of a specific category.

delete.description: Deletes a category by its ID.

put.summary: Update product quantity in shopping cart
put.description: Updates the quantity of a specific product in the user's shopping cart.

delete.summary: Remove a product from the shopping cart
delete.description: Removes a specific product from the user's shopping cart by its item ID.

get.description: Fetches the details of a article by its ID.

put.description: Updates the details of a specific article.

delete.description: Deletes a article by its ID.

post.description: Verifies the user's email address by checking the provided verification code. If the code is valid, the user can reset password.
Verifies the user's email address by checking the provided verification code. If the code is valid, the user's account will be marked as verified.

post.summary: Send verification code to email for rest password
post.description: Sends a verification code to the specified email address to verify the user's email during the reset password process.

post.summary: Send verification code to email for registration
post.description: Sends a verification code to the specified email address to verify the user's email during the registration process.

get.description: Retrieves all products as a pageable list.

post.description: Creates a new product with the provided details.
Creates a new international payment with the provided details.
Creates a new internal payment with the provided details.
Creates a new cash payment with the provided details.
Places a new order using the provided details.

get.description: Retrieves a pageable list of all categories.

post.description: Creates a new category with the provided details.

get.description: Fetches the details of the authenticated user's shopping cart.

post.summary: Add a product to the shopping cart
post.description: Adds a product to the user's shopping cart using the provided details.

Registers a new user by providing essential details such as email, phone number, password, first name, and last name. Upon successful registration, the user will be able to log in and access the system.
Authenticates the user using email and password, and returns a JWT token that can be used for subsequent API requests. The token grants access to protected resources in the application.

get.description: Retrieves a pageable list of all articles.

post.description: Create a new article with the provided details.

get.description: Fetches the profile information of the authenticated user.
Searches for products based on specified search criteria.
Retrieves products belonging to a specific category.

get.summary: Get products by reverse alphabetical order (descending, ua)
get.description: Retrieves products sorted by name(ua) in descending alphabetical order.

get.summary: Get products by alphabetical order (ascending, ua)
get.description: Retrieves products sorted by name(ua) in ascending alphabetical order.

get.summary: Get products by reverse alphabetical order (descending, eng)
get.description: Retrieves products sorted by name(eng) in descending alphabetical order.

get.summary: Get products by alphabetical order (ascending, eng)
get.description: Retrieves products sorted by name(eng) in ascending alphabetical order.

get.summary: Get products by latest publication date
get.description: Retrieves products sorted by the latest publication date.

get.summary: Get products by earliest publication date
get.description: Retrieves products sorted by the earliest publication date.
Fetches products within the specified price range.
Retrieves a pageable list of all payments.
Fetches the details of a payment by its ID.
Fetches all items associated with a specific order.
Fetches details of a specific item within an order.
Fetches the authenticated user's order history.

delete.description: Permanently deletes the authenticated user's profile.
